case_title: HOTEL ISABEL VS. BROWN WAYNE et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: LOST/UNAVAILABLE DOCUMENT - LEASE FILED BY PLAINTIFF HOTEL ISABEL

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HOTEL ISABEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WAYNE, BROWN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1095 MISSION ST. #417, S.F. CA., SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY DECLARATION RE: DAILY RENTAL VALUE $12.50 FILED. AS TO DEFENDANT WAYNE, BROWN
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT WAYNE, BROWN
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HOTEL ISABEL AS TO DEFENDANT WAYNE, BROWN 1-5 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
SUMMONS RETURNED FILED BY PLAINTIFF HOTEL ISABEL ON DEFENDANT WAYNE, BROWN
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HOTEL ISABEL SERVED AUG-30-2002, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT WAYNE, BROWN
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED AS TO DEFENDANT WAYNE, BROWN
